summary: A hybrid 4-4-2 / 4-2-3-1 built on wide combinations and pace in behind, pressing and countering — but exploitable in wide defensive areas.
style: 4-4-2 / 4-2-3-1 hybrid — wide combination play, crosses into the box, exploit pace in behind, press & counter.

counterReliance.note: Press & counter, exploit pace in behind

weaknesses: Could be exploited defensively in wide areas

keyPlayers.name: Iliman Ndiaye
keyPlayers.note: Goals, creativity and assists — pace, dribbling and an excellent crosser

tactics: Combine wide, cross into the box, and break with pace in behind while pressing aggressively. Could be a very exciting WC if they sort the wide defending.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
